unfortunately, I have to miss today's scrum... by Chao Yu
Chao Yu
10:31 AM

unfortunately, I have to miss today's scrum again because my body is not feeling very well.

Here's my report:

The ARM API spec for 2025-12-01 is finally merged into main branch. The doc team will update it in their next release loop.
The ARM API spec change for AgenticApplicationIsolationKeyResource is ready for review in 2026-01-15-preview.
Thank AJ for the comments on my A2A card MFE PR, I'll address the comments and apply the change into ARM API spec soon before it got merged.
The bug that ApiCenter entities deletion failure PR is ready, it's blocked by failing pipeline build CI. I'll keep checking on it.
feel better Chao, don't worry about the ind... by Ali Soylemezoglu
Ali Soylemezoglu
10:32 AM

feel better Chao, don't worry about the index thing then

AJ  so our passthrough determination is two... by Ali Soylemezoglu
Ali Soylemezoglu
11:14 AM

AJ so our passthrough determination is two fold:

 

application resolution: https://dev.azure.com/msdata/Vienna/_git/vienna?path=/src/azureml-api/src/Agents/Heads/ActivityProt… - this should be self-contained and should easily extractable. That has all the logic for how we pick up a deployment. The logic might not necessarily be correct, but it gets the job done
determining passthrough: https://dev.azure.com/msdata/Vienna/_git/vienna?path=/src/azureml-api/src/Agents/EntryPoints/Api/Co… - this has an if-else flow, else flow is for when deployments don't exist and we just do it based on agentKind and bot token existence. Still could be extracted away not sure the else is relevant for A2A

 

The meeting has reached its midpoint and th... by Facilitator

The meeting has reached its midpoint and the conversation is moving through updates as planned.
Updates and blockers so far

Team members shared progress on tool consent flows, agent PRs, and CMK resource changes. 12
Current blockers include testing agent service token acquisition and resolving merge conflicts in Agent V2. 23
Discussion covered risk mitigation for CMK changes and next steps for workspace impact. 45
Next steps for the rest of the meeting
Review remaining action items and assign owners for unresolved blockers. 56
Confirm priorities for upcoming PRs and resource updates before closing. 78
